Title: Extends the effectiveness of certain provisions relating to the establishment of certain water charges for hospitals and charities in New York city
Summary: Extends the effectiveness of certain provisions relating to the establishment of certain water charges for hospitals and charities in New York city from September 1, 2026 until September 1, 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 890 of the laws of 1982, relating to the establishment of certain water charges for hospitals and charities in New York city, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
